title: Legumes On-Farm Testing and Nursery Unit (LEGOFTEN): Summary report of Chickpea Trials, Postrainy season 1988-89
abstract: As per the ICRISAT/Government of India planning meeting, 25-26 April 1988 (Appendix 1), and ICRISAT/Department of Agriculture (DOA) Training workshop, 09-13 May 1988, held at ICRISAT Center (Appendix 2), a total of 33 unirrigated and 43 irrigated yield maximization trials of chickpea were planned in 10 Indian states (Appendixes 3a and 3b)...
